name: All triples
description: SPARQL 1.1 — basic SELECT over every triple.

name: Count by class
description: SPARQL 1.1 — aggregation (GROUP BY / COUNT / ORDER BY).
sparql: SELECT ?class (COUNT(?s) AS ?instances) WHERE { ?s a ?class } GROUP BY ?class ORDER BY DESC(?instances)

name: Class hierarchy
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?subclass ?ancestor WHERE { ?subclass rdfs:subClassOf+ ?ancestor } ORDER BY ?subclass

name: Book statistics
description: SPARQL 1.1 — aggregation (SUM/AVG) with OPTIONAL (the Voynich Manuscript has no page count).

name: Instances of a class
description: Parameter injection ({{class}} IRI) + property path (a/rdfs:subClassOf*) so subclasses are included without entailment.
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s a/rdfs:subClassOf* {{class}} OPTIONAL { ?s rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(langMatches(lang(?label), "en")) } } ORDER BY ?s

parameters.name: class
parameters.description: Class IRI to list instances of (subclasses included).

name: Describe a resource
description: SPARQL 1.1 CONSTRUCT (graph result) + parameter injection ({{subject}} IRI).

name: Labels by language
description: SPARQL 1.1 — FILTER/langMatches with a string parameter ({{lang}}).
sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?s ?label WHERE { ?s rdfs:label ?label . FILTER(langMatches(lang(?label), {{lang}})) } ORDER BY ?label

parameters.name: lang
parameters.description: BCP-47 language tag, e.g. en, nl, fr.

name: Publishers in an area
description: GeoSPARQL — geof:sfWithin over WKT geometries, via the geo:hasGeometry/geo:asWKT path.
sparql:
PREFIX ex: <https://example.org/standards-demo/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX geo: <http://www.opengis.net/ont/geosparql#>
PREFIX geof: <http://www.opengis.net/def/function/geosparql/>
SELECT ?publisher ?label ?wkt WHERE { ?publisher a ex:Publisher ; rdfs:label ?label ; geo:hasGeometry/geo:asWKT ?wkt . FILTER(geof:sfWithin(?wkt, "POLYGON((3 50, 6 50, 6 53, 3 53, 3 50))"^^geo:wktLiteral)) FILTER(langMatches(lang(?label), "en")) } ORDER BY ?label
